title: McDonalds in the Pentagon Music Disc
description: Replaces Music Disc 13 with the song "McDonalds in the Pentagon". Includes custom disc art.
body:
Replaces Music Disc 13 with the song "McDonalds in the Pentagon". Includes custom disc art.

![The texture of Music Disc 13, but with a McDonalds logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd07988214caff7a1c1b0e57d27971a5ae24f732.png)
